creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
In bsd.sites.mk:

MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB+=  \
*skip*
        ftp://ftp.dti.ad.jp/pub/X/XFree86/mirror/X.Org/contrib/%SUBDIR%/ \

the "mirror" sub-directory is not found on that server.
I get 

550 /pub/X/XFree86/mirror/X.Org/contrib/applications/xearth-1.1.tar.gz: No such file or directory.
550 /pub/X/XFree86/mirror/: No such file or directory.

Fix: 

Remove ftp.dti.ad.jp from MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB
